name: dialog-export
description: Local-only AI web conversation Markdown exporter for Chrome and Microsoft Edge.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode popup && vite build --mode background && vite build --mode content
scripts.check:release: npm run test && npm run build && node scripts/release-check.mjs
scripts.release: npm run icons && npm run check:release && node scripts/package-release.mjs && node scripts/release-check.mjs --archive
